footer.description: Not a consultancy. Your tech team.

home.heroDescription: We combine strategy, technology and design to create digital solutions that truly transform businesses. No smoke, no slides. Results.
home.manifestoTitle: Technology should work for your business. Not the other way around.
home.manifestoP1: Many companies accumulate tools, platforms and systems that don't talk to each other. The result: frustrated teams, scattered data and missed opportunities. We bring order.
home.manifestoP2: Every solution we design starts from the same principle: understand your business first, choose the technology second. Never the other way around.
home.manifestoP3: We're a team of engineers, architects and strategists who believe the best technology is the kind you don't notice — it simply works.
home.processDescription: We work side by side with your teams. Direct communication, no middlemen, with full visibility of the process.
home.step1Desc: We analyse your processes, systems and goals. Within a few weeks you have a clear view of the current state and the path forward.
home.step2Desc: We define the technical strategy: what to build, in what order and why. Every decision is justified by real business impact.
home.step3Desc: We deliver in short cycles, measure results and adjust. The project doesn't end with delivery — it evolves with you.
home.servicesDescription: We cover the entire digital transformation cycle: from initial strategy to ongoing operations. Every service is designed to generate real impact.
home.svc1Desc: Clear roadmaps with goals, priorities and metrics. Decisions based on data, not assumptions.
home.svc2Desc: Scalable, secure and cost-optimised platforms. Migration, management and operations without surprises.
home.svc3Desc: Robust web and mobile applications with clean, maintainable code. Built to last.
home.svc4Desc: Sensors, real-time data and automated processes that improve operational efficiency.
home.svc5Desc: Dashboards and analytics that turn data into actionable strategic decisions.
home.svc6Desc: Conversational agents and intelligent workflows that automate customer service, appointment management and repetitive tasks. Results from the first month.
home.clientsDescription: We work with companies across every sector looking for a reliable technology partner, not just another vendor.
home.t1Quote: Auratech understood our business from day one. They didn't sell us technology — they helped us solve real problems.
home.t2Quote: For the first time we have real visibility into what's happening in our stores. Data now drives decisions, not intuition.
home.t3Quote: The Auratech team is technically flawless, but what sets them apart is they get involved as if it were their own project.
home.ctaDescription: Tell us about your challenge and we'll help you find the best solution. No commitment, no formalities.
home.aiHeadline: WhatsApp AI agent for the beauty sector
home.aiSubheadline: For aesthetic clinics, hair salons, spas and beauty centres. Capture appointments when staff aren't there, reduce no-shows and free up reception from repetitive tasks. In Catalan and Spanish.
home.aiBullet1: 24/7 reply to WhatsApp messages in your brand voice
home.aiBullet2: Books and confirms appointments integrated with your calendar
home.aiBullet3: Pilot to production in 5 weeks — no lock-in
home.aiChat1Client: Hi, I'd like to book a treatment. What's available this week?
home.aiChat1Agent: Hi! 😊 We have availability Thursday at 5pm and Friday at 11:30am. Which works for you?
home.aiChat2Agent: Booked ✓ I'll send confirmation with pre-treatment instructions. Reminder 24h beforehand.

services.label: Services
services.title: Five areas.
services.subtitle: End-to-end expertise.
services.svc1Desc: We analyse your business in depth to define a technology plan aligned with your goals. Every recommendation is based on real impact.
services.svc1f1d: We assess your technology, processes and team to identify concrete improvement opportunities.
services.svc1f2d: We prioritise initiatives by impact and feasibility. A clear plan with milestones, owners and metrics.
services.svc1f3d: We define the complete technical ecosystem: services, integrations and data flows. Everything fits from day one.
services.svc1f4d: We support teams in adopting new tools and processes so transformation is real and lasting.
services.svc2Desc: We design and manage cloud infrastructure that scales with your business, with predictable costs and automated operations.
services.svc2f1d: AWS, GCP, Azure. Containers, serverless and high availability. We choose the best option for each case.
services.svc2f2d: Pipelines that take code from development to production in minutes, with automated tests and deployments.
services.svc2f3d: Monitoring, logs and intelligent alerts. We detect problems before they affect your service.
services.svc2f4d: We analyse and optimise your cloud spend so you pay exactly what you need.
services.svc3Desc: We build robust, scalable applications with engineering best practices. Software designed to last.
services.svc3f1d: SaaS platforms, portals and dashboards with React, Next.js and TypeScript. Fast, accessible and functional.
services.svc3f2d: Native and cross-platform apps with React Native and Flutter. Exceptional user experiences.
services.svc3f3d: Decoupled architectures with Node.js, Go and Python. REST, GraphQL and gRPC for maximum flexibility.
services.svc3f4d: We connect ERP, CRM, payment gateways and any system. Reliable, well-documented data flows.
services.svc4Desc: We capture data from the physical world and turn it into actionable intelligence. Sensors, edge computing and automation.
services.svc4f1d: BLE, MQTT, LoRa, Zigbee. Deployments that work reliably in real industrial environments.
services.svc4f2d: Local processing for scenarios where latency or connectivity are critical.
services.svc4f3d: Automated workflows, RPA and integrations that eliminate repetitive tasks and reduce errors.
services.svc4f4d: Digital replicas of physical assets for monitoring, simulation and predictive maintenance.
services.svc5Desc: Conversational agents and intelligent workflows that automate customer service, appointment management and repetitive tasks. Specialised in aesthetic clinics and SMBs in the health sector.
services.svc5f1d: AI bots over WhatsApp and web that understand context, respond 24/7 and hand off to human staff when needed.
services.svc5f2d: Specialised SaaS for aesthetic clinics: appointment management, automated reminders and post-sale care. GDPR compliance for health data.
services.svc5f3d: Process automation with LLMs: lead classification, qualification, CRM integration and notifications.
services.svc5f4d: We guide you through designing and implementing AI in your business. Real use cases, measurable ROI from month one.

projects.label: Projects
projects.title: Results.
projects.subtitle: Not promises.
projects.p1Title: ERP migration to cloud in 90 days
projects.p1Desc: An outdated ERP was costing their team 40 hours weekly. We migrated it to a cloud-native microservices architecture. Result: 70% faster processing and access from any location.
projects.p2Desc: Electronic shelf labels, per-store analytics, loyalty app and a centralised dashboard. From intuitive decisions to real-time data.
projects.p3Desc: Logistics app with optimised routes, real-time tracking and operations dashboard. 45% reduction in failed deliveries.
projects.p4Desc: SOC with threat detection and automated response for a fintech. Zero critical incidents in 18 months of operation.

cases.label: Case studies
cases.title: Results
cases.subtitle: that speak for themselves.
cases.description: Every project is an opportunity to prove that well-applied technology transforms businesses. Here are some examples.
cases.ctaDescription: Tell us about your challenge and we'll design a tailored solution.
cases.c1Desc: End-to-end digital transformation of a fashion chain with electronic shelf labels, analytics and loyalty app.
cases.c1Challenge: ModaViva managed prices manually across 45 stores, with frequent errors and no per-store performance data. Decisions were based on intuition.
cases.c1Solution: We deployed ESL across all stores, a centralised dashboard with real-time analytics and a loyalty app connected to the POS system.
cases.c1Quote: For the first time we have real visibility into what's happening in each store. Data now drives decisions.
cases.c2Desc: On-premise to AWS infrastructure migration with microservices architecture and DevOps automation.
cases.c2Challenge: Legacy systems with frequent downtime, high maintenance costs and inability to scale during demand peaks.
cases.c2Solution: Progressive migration to AWS with Terraform, automated CI/CD, Grafana monitoring and microservices architecture for critical systems.
cases.c2Quote: Auratech understood our business from day one. They didn't sell us technology — they helped us solve real problems.
cases.c3Desc: IoT platform for route optimisation, real-time tracking and automated incident management.
cases.c3Challenge: 45% failed deliveries, no real-time fleet visibility and entirely manual incident management.
cases.c3Solution: We built a native app with AI-optimised routes, IoT sensors on vehicles for real-time tracking and an operations dashboard with automated alerts.
cases.c3Quote: The Auratech team is technically flawless, but what sets them apart is they get involved as if it were their own project.
cases.c4Desc: Complete digital ecosystem: corporate intranet, invoicing web app and ERP integration middleware connecting all company tools.
cases.c4Challenge: Resol operated with disconnected internal processes: internal communication was via email, invoicing was manual and the ERP didn't communicate with other tools (CRM, logistics, e-commerce).
cases.c4Solution: We designed and built a custom intranet with document management and internal comms, an invoicing web app integrated with the ERP, and middleware connecting the ERP with CRM, logistics and e-commerce in real time.
cases.c4Quote: Now everything is connected. What used to take hours of manual work now happens automatically. The team can focus on what truly matters.
cases.c5Title: WhatsApp AI agent for an aesthetic clinic
cases.c5Desc: Conversational AI agent on WhatsApp Business for 24/7 appointment management, automated reminders and post-care. GDPR-compliant for health data.
cases.c5Challenge: The clinic was losing enquiries every night to unanswered messages, with a 28% no-show rate that no manual reminder could reduce. Reception spent hours daily on repetitive tasks — confirmations, prices, availability — instead of attending to clients in front of them.
cases.c5Solution: We deployed an AI agent on their WhatsApp Business that responds 24/7 with the brand voice, books appointments integrated with Google Calendar, sends automated 24h and 2h reminders before treatment, and hands off to human staff when it detects complexity or sensitivity.
cases.c5Quote: Reception is back to doing real reception work. The agent takes 80% of routine queries and escalates to us when it actually matters. Clients don't notice they're talking to an AI — and when they do, they like it because it solves their problem.

labs.label: Labs
labs.title: Applied
labs.subtitle: innovation
labs.description: We dedicate time to exploring emerging technologies and building prototypes. When a project arrives, we already have proven solutions and accumulated knowledge.
labs.philosophyTitle: Continuous innovation makes us better on every project.
labs.philosophyP1: Every experiment we run — whether it works or not — gives us knowledge we apply to real projects. The best solutions come from constant exploration.
labs.philosophyP2: We reserve weekly time for the team to research and experiment. That's where ideas emerge that end up transforming projects.
labs.exp1Desc: Intelligent document processing with LLMs: automatic classification, data extraction and report generation.
labs.exp2Desc: Machine learning on local devices for computer vision in industrial environments without cloud connectivity.
labs.exp3Desc: Spending analysis tool for AWS, GCP and Azure with automatic recommendations. Average savings of 35%.
labs.exp4Desc: Headless architecture with Medusa, Next.js and Stripe. Modular, scalable e-commerce without closed platform limitations.
labs.exp5Desc: Self-configuring, self-healing BLE sensor network. Plug and play for warehouses and industrial environments.
labs.exp6Desc: Security tools integrated into the development pipeline from the first commit.

about.label: About
about.title: Technology
about.subtitle: with purpose.
about.whoTitle: A technical team with business vision.
about.whoP1: Auratech was founded on the conviction that digital transformation must deliver tangible results. We don't sell ideas — we build them, implement them and make them work.
about.whoP2: We're a team of engineers, cloud architects and digital strategists working from Catalonia with clients across Spain. You speak directly to the people doing the work, with no layers in between.
about.whoP3: We stay involved until the end. Delivery isn't the finish line — it's the starting point of an ongoing collaboration.
about.v1Desc: Every project has clear KPIs. If we can't measure the value we deliver, we reassess the approach.
about.v2Desc: Repository access, real-time metrics and complete cost visibility. No surprises.
about.v3Desc: Clean, tested, documented code. We invest in quality because it's what guarantees long-term results.
about.v4Desc: We grow with our clients. Their success is the best validation of our work.
about.teamDescription: A small, multidisciplinary team with real industry experience. You speak directly with the people making technical and commercial decisions.
about.m1Bio: Engineer and technical architect. Leads strategic vision, architecture design and product development at Auratech.
about.m2Bio: Leads commercial outreach and client relations for the new AI Automations line. National operations from Asturias.

legal.legalCompanyInfo:
Owner: Aura Tech, S.L. (registered name: Aura Tech, Sociedad Limitada)
Tax ID (CIF/NIF): B67702654
Registered office: Avinguda Lluís Vilaclara, 2 — 08274 Sant Feliu Sasserra (Barcelona), Spain
Registry details: registered at the Mercantile Registry of Barcelona, volume 48042, folio 41, page B-570423, entry 1. European Unique Identifier (EUID): ES08005.000662958.
Email: info@auratech.cat

In compliance with Article 10 of Spanish Law 34/2002 of 11 July on information society services and electronic commerce (LSSI-CE), the identifying details of the owner of this website, Aura Tech, S.L. (hereinafter, "Auratech"), are stated above.

Auratech has operational locations in Vic (Catalonia) and Avilés (Asturias); the registered office for legal purposes is the one stated above. For any enquiries or communications, you can contact us at info@auratech.cat.
legal.legalIntellectual: All content on this website, including text, images, graphics, logos, icons, source code and software, is the property of Aura Tech SL or its licensors and is protected by applicable intellectual and industrial property laws. The reproduction, distribution, public communication or transformation, in whole or in part, of the content of this website is prohibited without the express written authorisation of Aura Tech SL.
legal.legalLiability: Auratech shall not be held liable for any damages or losses arising from the use of this website, including, without limitation, errors or omissions in the content, unavailability of the website, or the transmission of viruses or malicious software. Auratech reserves the right to modify the content of the website at any time without prior notice.
legal.legalLaw: This legal notice is governed by Spanish law. For the resolution of any dispute that may arise in connection with the use of this website, the parties submit to the courts and tribunals of the user's domicile, in accordance with applicable regulations.
legal.privacyController: The data controller is Aura Tech SL, with registered office in Catalonia, Spain. You can contact the data controller at info@auratech.cat.
legal.privacyData: The personal data we collect through this website includes: (a) Contact form: name, email address, phone number (optional) and message. (b) Analytics: anonymous browsing data collected through Google Analytics 4 (GA4), such as pages visited, session duration and device type.
legal.privacyBasis: The legal basis for processing your data is: (a) The consent you provide when submitting the contact form or accepting analytics cookies. (b) Auratech's legitimate interest in improving its services and the website browsing experience.
legal.privacyRetention: Contact form data will be retained for a maximum of 12 months from the last communication. Analytics data is retained anonymously for a period of 14 months, as configured in Google Analytics 4.
legal.privacyRights: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) you have the right to: access your personal data (Article 15), request rectification or erasure (Article 17), object to processing (Article 21), request restriction (Article 18), and data portability (Article 20). If you have an Auratech account, you can exercise these rights directly from your profile at /dashboard/perfil — buttons "Download my data" and "Delete my account". If you don't have an account, email info@auratech.cat. You also have the right to file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD).
legal.privacyContact: For any queries related to personal data protection, you can contact us at info@auratech.cat.
legal.privacySubprocessors: To deliver the service we use the following subprocessors, all under signed DPA or standard DPA template: (a) Hetzner Online GmbH (Frankfurt, Germany) — application and database hosting. (b) Resend (Dublin, Ireland) — transactional email delivery (contact form notifications). (c) Microsoft 365 (EU) — mailboxes for the auratech.cat domain. (d) Google Fonts (EU/US servers under the Data Privacy Framework) — typographic fonts on the website. (e) Google Analytics 4 (US servers under the Data Privacy Framework) — anonymous browsing analytics, consent-gated.
legal.privacyArticle9: GDPR Article 9 — health data. Our AI agent product line for aesthetic clinics (auratech.cat/automatitzacions-ia) processes patient conversations with the clinics that use the service. These conversations can contain health information (GDPR Article 9). In that context the clinic is the data controller and Auratech is the data processor. Measures applied: (a) data stored on EU servers (Hetzner Frankfurt). (b) encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest. (c) DPA signed with each clinic before the pilot. (d) audit logs for access. (e) deletion of conversations on customer request. If you have interacted with an AI agent run by a clinic on our service and want to exercise rights over that data, contact the clinic first (the data controller) or, alternatively, write to info@auratech.cat.
legal.privacyTransfers: Some data may be transferred outside the European Economic Area: (a) Google Analytics 4 and Google Fonts — United States, under the Data Privacy Framework (European Commission adequacy decision, July 2023). (b) Microsoft 365 — may process metadata in the US under the DPF and Standard Contractual Clauses. All other processing remains within the EU (Hetzner Germany, Resend Ireland).
legal.cookiesWhat: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They are used to remember preferences, improve the browsing experience and obtain analytical information about how the site is used.
legal.cookiesTypes: This website uses the following types of cookies: (a) Essential cookies: necessary for the basic functioning of the website, such as session management. They do not require consent. (b) Analytics cookies: Google Analytics 4 (GA4) uses cookies to collect anonymous information about how visitors use the website. These cookies are only activated with your consent. (c) Functional cookies: used to remember your preferences, such as your selected language.
legal.cookiesManage: You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Each browser offers options to accept, reject or delete cookies. Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of the website. You can also modify your consent at any time by updating your cookie preferences.
legal.cookiesThirdParty: Google Analytics 4 (GA4): we use GA4 to analyse website traffic and user behaviour. Google may transfer and store data on servers outside the European Economic Area. For more information on how Google processes data, please see their privacy policy at https://policies.google.com/privacy.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Digital infrastructure is the set of technologies, systems and platforms that enable a business to operate efficiently in the digital environment. It includes cloud servers, networks, databases, collaboration tools and security systems. At Auratech, we design and implement custom digital infrastructure so your business runs smoothly and scales effectively.
faq.q2: How does electronic shelf labelling (ESL) work?
faq.a2: Electronic shelf labelling uses e-ink displays connected via Bluetooth or WiFi to show prices and product information in real time. This eliminates the need for paper labels, reduces human error and allows prices to be updated centrally and instantly across all stores.
faq.q3: How much does cloud migration cost?
faq.a3: The cost of cloud migration depends on several factors: the complexity of current systems, data volume, performance requirements and the chosen platform (AWS, GCP, Azure). At Auratech, we provide a free initial diagnosis to give you a realistic quote and a migration plan with predictable costs. In many cases, migration generates savings in the medium term.
faq.q4: Do I need IoT for my business?
faq.a4: IoT is especially useful if your business needs to monitor physical assets, optimise operational processes or collect real-time data from the environment. Sectors such as logistics, retail, manufacturing and hospitality benefit enormously from connected sensors and devices. We help you assess whether IoT can deliver real value for your specific case.
faq.a5: Our digital strategy includes: assessment of your current technology state, defining objectives and KPIs, designing a prioritised roadmap, systems architecture, technology selection and implementation support. It's not just a document: we accompany you at every stage to ensure measurable results.
faq.q6: Do you work with small businesses?
faq.a6: Yes. We work with businesses of all sizes, from startups to established companies. Our modular approach allows us to adapt services to each client's needs and budget. Many small businesses need exactly the type of solutions we offer: efficient, scalable and with a real impact on the business.

cookies.bannerText: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyse website traffic.

strategy.headline: We define the technology roadmap your business needs.
strategy.description: We analyse your business in depth to design a digital strategy aligned with your goals. Every decision is based on data and real impact.
strategy.longDescription: Many companies invest in technology without a clear plan. The result: tools that don't talk to each other, uncontrolled costs and frustrated teams. We start from the beginning: we understand your business, identify opportunities and design a plan with priorities, milestones and metrics. It's not a document that ends up in a drawer — we accompany you at every stage of implementation.
strategy.metaDesc: We define the digital roadmap for your business: diagnosis, architecture, KPIs and support. Technology consulting from Catalonia.
benefits: Complete diagnosis of your current technology
Roadmap with priorities and measurable milestones
Systems architecture aligned with business objectives
Support in implementation and change management
Measurable ROI at every stage of the project

cloud.headline: Scalable, secure and cost-optimised cloud infrastructure.
cloud.description: We design and manage cloud environments that scale with your business. Migration, automation and operations without surprises.
cloud.longDescription: Cloud isn't just about moving servers — it's about rethinking how your business operates. We design cloud-native architectures with AWS, GCP or Azure, implement automated CI/CD so deployments are fast and secure, and monitor everything in real time. The result: less downtime, predictable costs and the ability to scale when you need it.
cloud.metaTitle: Cloud & DevOps — Cloud Migration & Infrastructure | Auratech
cloud.metaDesc: Cloud migration, CI/CD, Kubernetes and observability. Scalable infrastructure with AWS, GCP and Azure for businesses.

dev.headline: Robust, scalable software built to last.
dev.description: We build web and mobile applications with engineering best practices. Clean, tested and documented code.
dev.longDescription: We don't build software to deliver and leave. Every application we develop follows solid engineering principles: clean architecture, automated tests, complete documentation and code that any team can maintain. We work with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Flutter and whichever technologies best suit your case. The result: applications that work, scale and evolve with your business.
dev.metaTitle: Software Development — Web & Mobile Apps | Auratech
dev.metaDesc: Web and mobile application development with React, Next.js and Flutter. Custom software, APIs and integrations for businesses.
benefits: SaaS web applications with React and Next.js
Integrations with ERP, CRM and existing systems

iot.headline: We connect the physical world with digital intelligence.
iot.description: Sensors, edge computing and automation to capture real-world data and turn it into intelligent decisions.
iot.longDescription: IoT lets you monitor physical assets, optimise processes and automate repetitive tasks. We deploy sensor networks (BLE, MQTT, LoRa), process data in real time with edge computing and build dashboards that give full visibility of operations. From electronic shelf labelling in retail to predictive maintenance in industry, every solution adapts to your real environment.
iot.metaTitle: IoT & Retail Tech — Sensors & Automation | Auratech
iot.metaDesc: IoT solutions for retail, industry and logistics: sensors, edge computing, ESL and intelligent automation.
benefits: Reliable sensor networks in industrial environments
